features: Compact Size, Big Sound... Don't let the cute compact design fool you! The NANO packs a serious punch with 80 Watts Peak Power, delivering deep bass and crystal-clear audio.

Dual Rechargeable Mics... No more annoying cables or hunting for expensive AA batteries! The NANO includes two high-quality wireless microphones that are rechargeable and feature super convenient full volume & echo dials directly on the microphone body
Trusted UK Brand... Supplied by Mr Entertainer UK Karaoke Specialists, offering reliable support for your peace of mind

Instant Streaming.... Connect your smartphone or tablet instantly via BT 5.0 to stream karaoke videos from YouTube or your favourite Karaoke Apps, or use as a Party Speaker and play music from Spotify, Apple Music or other apps.

Fun Voice Effects.... Add to the fun with built-in magic voice changers (turn your voice into a squeaky chipmunk or deep monster!), plus dedicated buttons for Applause and Heckle sound effects to bring the live show feel & fun to your living room.

Thousands Of Free Songs.... Never run out of music! Access the official Mr Entertainer Karaoke YouTube channel to stream thousands of professional quality karaoke tracks completely FREE of charge. Our library is updated weekly with all the latest chart hits and pop classics, giving you an endless supply of music for your party.
Light Show...Features a stunning full-front LED light show with multiple patterns that dance to the beat of your music to create an instant party atmosphere.

Top Mounted Control Panel buttons, Adjust Music Volume, Skip etc High Quality Sound Packs a serious punch for such a compact device, boasting 80 Watts Peak Power speakers, ensuring high quality audio even at full volume with deep bass TRUSTED UK BRAND Advanced Karaoke Features 1 2 3 4 Nano Compare 80W Peak Power 110W 2 x Wireless Microphones Included 2 x Wireless Light Effects Rechargeable Battery Touchscreen 18H x 16Dx 17W Dimensions (cm) W30 x H20 x D15 1.6kg Weight 2kg 80W Peak Power 50W 2 x Wireless Microphones Included 2 x Wireless Light Effects Rechargeable Battery Touchscreen 18H x 16Dx 17W Dimensions (cm) 12 L x 16.5H x 12D — Weight — 80W Peak Power 150W 2 x Wireless Microphones Included 2 x Wireless Light Effects Rechargeable Battery Touchscreen 18H x 16Dx 17W Dimensions (cm) 34H x 22D x 23W 1.6kg Weight 4kg 80W Peak Power 250W 2 x Wireless Microphones Included 2 x Wireless Light Effects Rechargeable Battery Touchscreen 18H x 16Dx 17W Dimensions (cm) 7.4H x 8.5D x 94W 1.6kg Weight 3kg Previous page Neon Learn More Orbit Learn More Moonbox Learn More Starbar Learn More Next page Is it difficult to use? Not at all! It works like any other wireless speaker, just connect your smart device, play a song, turn on the microphone and start singing How do i find karaoke videos to singalong to? Visit our Mr Entertainer Youtube Channel and singalong to thousands of high quality Karaoke videos totally free! Can i singalong to normal music on apps like Spotify? Yes, but you will be singing over the original singer, and if you want the colour changing on screen lyrics you need to use a video site like youtube, or a proper karaoke app/website Can i connect to my TV? It depends on your TV. Many modern TV's have BT Mode meaning you can wirelessly connect, or if your TV has a headphone socket, you can connect via AUX Cable (included) Will this play Karaoke Discs? No, the Nano is designed to be used with phones, tablets, laptops and smart TV's so does not have a built in CD Player, checkout our Amazon store for disc based Karaoke Machines Mr Entertainer Karaoke The UK's Premier Collection of Karaoke Products With so much choice available, deciding on the right Karaoke Machine for you can be tough, for help or advice contact our friendly UK based support team and speak directly to a human straight away
